title: Racy Mediterranean Boudin Blanc Bowl
description: A sour and fluffy Mediterranean bowl featuring browned boudin blanc, crisp veggies, cauliflower rice, and citrus spherified pearls, perfect for whole30 meal prep.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook sliced boudin blanc until browned and crisp, about 5 minutes, then set aside.
In the same skillet, add cauliflower rice and sauté for 3 minutes until heated through, then set aside with the sausage.
Toss cherry tomatoes, cucumber, bell pepper, and red onion with olive oil, lemon juice, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Steam the veggie mixture for 2 minutes to keep them crisp yet tender.
Combine veggies, cauliflower rice, and sausage in a large bowl and fold gently.
Stir in chopped parsley and mint for freshness.
Prepare lemon spheres by mixing 1 tbsp lemon juice, 1 tsp sodium alginate, and 1 tsp calcium lactate, then drop into a calcium bath to set for 60 seconds.
Carefully remove the spheres, rinse in cold water, and deposit lightly on the bowl.
Serve the bowl immediately or pack for meal prep, refrigerating up to 3 days.
Rewarm gently in a skillet or microwave before serving.
